title: Change references to projectatomic/libpod to containers/libpod

comments.body: @rhatdan was removing `vendor/github.com/ulikunitz/xz` intentional? I assume `vndr` removed that as there's no reference on it anymore.

It looks like we're having a bootstrapping problem as both, buildah and libpod, need to change the references but both vendor code of the other:
```
vendor/github.com/containers/libpod/pkg/secrets/secrets.go:13:2: cannot find package "github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pkg/rootless" in any of:
```

I suggest to run to run the tests locally here and force merge. @rhatdan @TomSweeneyRedHat wdyt?
I think another (maybe better) solution is to symlink or copy libpod also to `vendor/github.com/projectatomic/libpod` for a short time.
Maybe it's time to move buildah to containers too?  Not sure if that will help or not, but at least it would all be the same....
I was hoping to wait til next week.
I had already a PR for doing the renaming: https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/pull/927, going to close it
@TomSweeneyRedHat @nalind @vrothberg @umohnani8 @pixdrift Lets get this merged so we can further fix up libpod.

:pushpin: Commit 78900fd has been approved by `umohnani8`
